summary: The diff implements logo replacement across Navigation, BooksPage, and index.html using the new logo file (lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png). REQ-23, REQ-24, and REQ-25 appear to be addressed. However, the new logo asset file itself is not present in the diff (no files added under frontend/public/assets/generated/), and REQ-26 requires auditing Footer, ProfileSetupModal, and authentication pages — none of which show changes in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: The new logo image must be saved as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated/
missing_requirements.reason: No file was added to frontend/public/assets/generated/ in the diff. The ADDED FILES section shows 'none', so the actual image asset lit-heaven-logo-new.dim_400x400.png is not present.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit all other frontend components (Footer, ProfileSetupModal, authentication pages, and any remaining components) for references to the old logo and update each to use the new logo.
missing_requirements.reason: Only Navigation.tsx and BooksPage.tsx were modified. Footer.tsx, ProfileSetupModal.tsx, and any authentication page components are not shown as modified in the diff, so no audit or update is evidenced for these components.
